name: Pumpkin Rabbit and Witch Sheep
description:
You are an urban explorer, looking for new thrills in your explorations, which a house that once belonged to a couple of child murderers tempted you too much.

You will soon discover that the house is not abandoned at all.

TW!!! High possibility of Gore, Violence, Potential User Death, DUB/NONCON!

Well, this is my first attempt at a multi-bot, I hope you enjoy it and I'm open to your feedback on what I can improve or if you found any flaws in the bot.

Oh, Pumpkin Rabbit and Witch Sheep's real names are also being used in this bot.
creator: Jacko'
